items.title: „Bei den Olivenanbauern zeichnet sich ein zukunftsversprechender Generationenwechsel ab. Immer mehr junge Italiener kehren nach ihrem Studium oder ihrer Auslandserfahrung in die Familienbetriebe zurück, die für eine beständige Qualität in der Olivenölproduktion sorgen. Sie bringen viel Wissen in die traditionellen Betriebe ein. Mit neuen Visionen, Management-Know-how und Kenntnissen in der Betriebsführung schlagen sie neue Wege ein, um in einem immer globalisierteren Markt zu bestehen“

"For the true seeker and truth seeker, 'Putting On Christ' may prove a valuable guide for the journey along [the] straight and narrow path which leads to obtaining the knowledge of God on the same level as if we had seen Him," "When we receive this knowledge, we will have been healed and cleansed by Christ himself of our sins, vices, and spiritual wounds"
“Non avremmo mai pensato che uno dei nostri progetti arrivasse ad avere una missione educativa”
“Türkiye bizim için çok önemli bir ülke. Bunun nedeni sadece kurucumuzun Türkiye doğumlu olması değil. Aynı zamanda Türkiye’de çok sayıda mağazamız ve büyük bir üretim ağımız var”

“We are entering the countdown to Light + Building with great energy and are delighted by the strong participation of renowned market leaders as well as new exhibitors and start-ups. The international presence and the high level of registrations despite challenging market conditions underline the relevance of the trade fair. Light + Building is the place where the industry’s key needs become visible – from the interplay of energy-efficient technology, digital connectivity and lighting in all its facets to solutions addressing high construction and energy costs, skills shortages and renovation pressures. Current challenges are addressed here while forward-looking impulses are set,”
